LONG_DESC:
I like programming as much as games.
I am a software developer who wants to learn something new every day and have things to do at all times.

I have experience in multiple languages such as:
D_PORTFOLIO: Source code of my web portfolio
D_TODO_RUST: To-Do mini app made in Rust to learn
D_RW_API: RestFUL API made in TypeScript for a gaming community that currently doesn't exist anymore, the API was made entirely by me, it uses the following modules: express, mysql, JWT and bcrypt.js
D_RW_WEB: The Rootwide API website, this website (like the API) is abandoned and outdated, it is made with React.js and JavaScript.
